twitter_thread: 95% of lossless scaling tools are glorified upscaling algorithms. Only 5% actually improve frame generation.
Lanczos resampling plus adaptive sharpening can boost frame rates by 15% on a 1080p source.
Real-ESRGAN outperforms built-in upscaling by 32% on 4K video, Topaz Labs by 28% on 2K images.
Don't waste 40% of your GPU on lossless scaling low-res sources. Start with 2K or higher.
Optimized lossless scaling can shave 12ms off gaming latency, a 20% improvement.
Subpar lossless scaling tools introduce artifacts like haloing or ringing. Look for tools with <1% error rates.
What's your go-to lossless scaling tool for software development? #losslesscaling #softwareoptimization
